# HKEX Invest

> HKEX Invest is an independent financial technology platform offering managed multi-asset portfolios across Forex, Gold, commodities, indices and stocks. HKEX Invest is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited (HKEX).

## About

- [About HKEX Invest](https://www.hkexinvest.com/about): Company overview and mission
- [How It Works](https://www.hkexinvest.com/how-it-works): Onboarding and investment process
- [FAQ](https://www.hkexinvest.com/faq): Common questions and factual answers
- [Contact](https://www.hkexinvest.com/contact): Official contact channels

## Platform

- [Portfolios](https://www.hkexinvest.com/portfolios): Managed multi-asset portfolios
- [Copy Trading](https://www.hkexinvest.com/copy-trading): Copy-trading program
- [Markets](https://www.hkexinvest.com/markets): Live market data
- [Education](https://www.hkexinvest.com/education): Investor education resources
- [News](https://www.hkexinvest.com/risk): Curated global market news

## Important Disclosures

- HKEX Invest is an independent platform. It is NOT the Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited (HKEX).
- Investing involves risk, including possible loss of principal. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
- Legal documents on this site are professional templates and should be reviewed by qualified legal counsel before being relied upon.
